description: Style Note Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Product Details  Peach printed kurta made of 100% viscose, has a V-neckline, short sleeves and has a vented hem Material and Care 100% viscose Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
